phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il bagno per clienti, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel BAH-nyo per klyen-TEE, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the back, on the right.

responses.english: At the back, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora aprite la mattina?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah KEH OH-rah ah-PREE-teh lah mat-TEE-nah

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un caffè al banco?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah oon kaf-FEH al BAN-koh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the menu.

responses.english: It is indicated on the menu.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, avete un tavolo libero fuori?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah-VEH-teh oon TAH-vo-loh LEE-beh-roh FWOH-ree

likely_response.translation_en: Only at the bar, I'm sorry.

responses.english: Only at the bar, I'm sorry.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si ordina la granita, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see OR-dee-nah lah grah-NEE-tah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Tell the barista what you want.

responses.english: Tell the barista what you want.
